title: Chains
description: It's time to become one of the greatest Chain Engineers.
body:
![0.3 TItle](https://i.imgur.com/hjgc89b.png)

#  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО    вАО      вАО       вАО    вАО     вАО        вАО    вАО  вАО  вАО   вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО       вАО  рЯМЯ Chains рЯТЂ

**Chains** is a vanilla-style data pack, that tries to improve vanilla Minecraft gameplay by adding
some completely new **Blocks**,**Items**, and, most importantly, **Machines**. The main Idea of the Datapack is to connect Machines with CT (Chain Torque) Sources using, well, **chains**. 

For instance, you need to connect a Sawmill to any CT Source using chains to get it to work. Although Chains was inspired by Create, none of the features were taken from it, everything was made on our own.

> рЯТ° Chains has its own [Wiki](https://chains.fandom.com/wiki/Chains_Datapack_Wiki), check it out for exciting features!


##  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО   вАО     вАО  вАО  вАО вАО вАО вАО  вАО  вАО вАО  вАО  вАО     вАО  вАО  вАО   вАО  вАО  вАО  вАО     вАО  вАО  вАО   вАО   вАО   вАО   рЯМН Resource Pack рЯЦЉпЄП

To make your experience even better, we've made a Resource Pack. Make sure to install it to gain yourself a completely new experience while playing with Chains. It's always better to have visual appearance, right?

> рЯТ° Unfortunately, Chains wasn't meant to be played in multiplayer, if you want to do so, you're welcome, but make sure to create a backup!
